children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses her work with Joe Bernal, the Guadalupe Community Center, and her involvement in the Young Democrats.

citation: "Political Involvement in High School," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4216/political-involvement-in-high-school, accessed May 08, 2026.
label: 8. Political Involvement in High School
